vuln_q_0043_0003.title: Clear-text logging of sensitive information
vuln_q_0043_0003.description: This expression logs [sensitive data (password)](1) as clear text.

vuln_q_0069_0000.title: Use of a broken or weak cryptographic algorithm
vuln_q_0069_0000.description: [The cryptographic algorithm DES](1) is broken or weak, and should not be used.

vuln_q_0039_0001.title: Use of insecure SSL/TLS version
vuln_q_0039_0001.description:
Insecure SSL/TLS protocol version TLSv1 allowed by [call to ssl.create_default_context](1).
Insecure SSL/TLS protocol version TLSv1_1 allowed by [call to ssl.create_default_context](1).

Insecure SSL/TLS protocol version TLSv1_1 allowed by [call to ssl.create_default_context](1).

vuln_q_0017_0004.title: Construction of a cookie using user-supplied input
vuln_q_0017_0004.description: Cookie is constructed from a [user-supplied input](1).

vuln_q_0041_0003.title: Log Injection
vuln_q_0041_0003.description: This log entry depends on a [user-provided value](1).
